ham: Dear Customer, this is a reminder that your broadband engineer, Mr. Sharma, will visit your premises on 28th April 2026 at 10:30 AM to install the new fibre modem. Please ensure a staff member is present to sign the delivery receipt. Thank you for choosing SpeedNet.
spam: Hey! We saw your profile and think you'd love a 100% remote job! Earn ₹15,000/day without leaving home. Click <URL> to apply ASAP. Serious offer, reply NO to stop.
